name: Ciuffetti with Porcini Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Fresh porcini mushrooms (2 oz dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute garlic in butter until it becomes translucent.
2. Add porcini mushrooms, thinly sliced, white wine, marjoram, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Cook the pasta separately.
4. When the white wine and water have completely evaporated, add cream and simmer for approximately 2 minutes until the sauce thickens.
5. Stir in chopped fresh basil and grated Parmigian cheese.
6. Toss the cooked pasta with the sauce.
